# Core_Analysis

**Summary**: Physical measurements of core plugs to determine primary reservoir properties.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-islam|Islam, 2020]] applied helium porosity-permeability measurements on 70 plug samples to quantify reservoir quality.

## Key Results and Findings

- Permeability values ranged from 7.3 mD to 714.61 mD, showing higher heterogeneity than porosity. ([[2020-islam|Islam, 2020, p. 133]])
